Browser-local public proof lab · no account · no wallet · no network

When proof is zero,
trusted work is zero.

A normal demo shows output. This simulator shows the institutional law underneath GoalOS: output becomes trusted work only when proof, validation, settlement, and reusable capability survive gates.

AI Work = Output × Proof × Validation × Settlement × Reuse
Mission Value = DecisionImpact × ProofIntegrity × Actionability × Reuse ÷ (Cost + Risk + Latency + ProofDebt)

Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, customer, wallet, seed, or private-key information. This is a local public-safe simulator; it does not certify external facts or authorize action.

Trusted institutional work

Trusted Work
Verdict · Awaiting proof gatesNo proof, no settlementNo rollback, no release

Trusted Work

Output is useful only if proof, validation, settlement, and reuse are non-zero.

Mission Value

0

Decision impact rises when actionability and proof integrity rise; it falls with cost, risk, latency, and proof debt.

Proof Debt Pressure

0

Proof debt measures how dangerous it is for unverified output to become institutional default.
